name: Configure 6-Panel BCI Research Multi-Modal Dashboard
description: You are a computational neuroscience graduate student setting up a multi-modal BCI monitoring dashboard for your lab's cognitive study. Configure the OpenBCI GUI with a 6-panel research dashboard using a Synthetic EEG session. Assign the panels to Time Series, FFT Plot, Band Power, Accelerometer, Focus, and Head Plot widgets. Set the notch filter to 60 Hz and enable Expert Mode. Save the configuration to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Settings/ and take a screenshot to document the dashboard for lab records.

metadata.persona: Computational neuroscience graduate student / BCI researcher
